reviews.text:
if I have to give zero stars I would. My experience with this attorney was extremely disappointing and unprofessional. He handled my car accident case for more than four years without making meaningful progress. On multiple occasions, he admitted that he delayed my case because he considered his other clients “more important cases” than mine.
Throughout the process, he was difficult to communicate with, often becoming upset when we tried to reach out. He repeatedly requested unnecessary documents, many of which were nearly impossible to obtain, even after we had already provided extensive paperwork for years,  clearly just to delay the process. This caused significant delays and unnecessary stress.
Most concerning, he left me threatening voice messages, stating he would remove me from the case and only continue with my husband and son, simply because I didn’t answer his call— despite knowing I was hospitalized at the time. This conduct was completely unacceptable, unprofessional, disrespectful and unethical.
After four years of wasted time and effort, he abruptly quit and instructed my husband to find another lawyer. His firm is untrustworthy, his behavior shows a lack of commitment, respect, and responsibility toward his clients. Save yourself the stress and do not hire him.
I would strongly caution anyone considering this firm. In my opinion, they are unreliable and do not act in the best interest of their clients.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback.

We are truly sorry to hear that you feel this way. We take every client concern very seriously, and professionalism, communication, and ethical conduct are core values of our firm.

After carefully reviewing your account, we do not believe it accurately reflects the handling of your case. At no point were you or your family deprioritized, nor were delays caused by anything other than the normal legal process and the need for accurate documentation required to move a case forward. And we successfully settled the case for you and your family.

While we cannot discuss specific case details publicly due to privacy and ethical obligations, we welcome the opportunity to clarify any misunderstandings directly. Please feel free to reach back out to me at 954-742-6999.

Our firm remains committed to transparency, respectful communication, and diligent representation for every client. We wish you and your family the very best moving forward.

reviews.text:
I am extremely impressed with Loren's service to date. I couldn't even speak with my former counsel regarding my med mal issue. His assistant waited months with valuable information, then decided to refuse to proceed further based on mis-stated and inaccurate information. It is a shame that this happened and that I was disrespected in this fashion. Loren was my next choice-he should have been my first.

Loren immediately spoke with me in initial contact and set up phone conversations with his associates. The case was thoroughly discussed based on the information we had. We spent hours on the phone about it, and the consult must have been at least one or two hrs. They were all shocked that I was treated by former counsel in this fashion without being spoken to.

Loren then referred me to counsel at two different law firms that he associated professionally with.  He took the lead and interfaced with them on my behalf before any contracts were signed. One of these firms has a very capable RN-JD, formerly a cardiac nurse, who went above and beyond based on things she saw in the chart which nobody else, even with equivalent medical credentials, had picked up. (Thank you, Janet.) She interviewed me personally, and after due diligence on her part to an outstanding degree, the firm has taken the case.

All of this was ultimately due to Loren's work. He is somebody that treats you like family, as he did with me (I am not related btw).  He works extremely hard and has called me out of business hours to discuss developments.

For anybody who reads this with a med mal issue (and he handles other areas, if you look at his pedigree)-go to this man first. He will do his best, and tell you if he can't help directly, then try his other contacts to place a good fit for your circumstances. If all attorneys forgot about the ego they developed during their careers, Shakespeare's  advice to "kill all the lawyers" would ring upon deaf ears.

Once again, my heartfelt thanks are due to him for approaching an almost religious calling to his work.

Respectfully submitted.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank You for your kind words, Tom,
I am enjoying representing you.
Best,
Loren

reviews.text: It's incredible how many positive reviews I've read about this group of lawyers, but my experience with them has been catastrophic. My accident happened on January 31, 2024, and I hired attorney Andrew R. Smith. Month after month, I called to check on my case, but my lawyer was never available. The receptionist or secretary would try to give me some explanation, but the lawyer was always busy, and I never received any concrete updates on the progress of my case. In October, the secretary hinted that the lawyer was considering transferring the case to another attorney, but he didn't. I still never received a call, an email, a message—nothing. Every month passed, and I called again for nothing. On my last call this past January 25, only the receptionist answered because even the lawyer's secretary couldn't take my call. I asked them to please call me back, but they never did. Instead, they sent me a letter to my home stating their decision to discontinue my case without any concrete explanation. It's not easy. Having had me on the case for almost a year, wasting my time and practically losing it, in my opinion, demonstrates their incompetence and lack of professionalism. It's a shame; now I have to start from scratch. I hope other clients don't suffer this great disappointment. I have no other way to express what I'm feeling; this is the only way I found. I wish you success in all your cases, because your clients are, of course, the reason lawyers exist.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Velazco,

We understand that you are frustrated with the progress of your case. We want to assure you that we have been diligently working on this matter.

We have followed the necessary legal procedures, including sending multiple notice letters as required by law (FL Stat 768.28) before filing a lawsuit. Specifically, the potential defendant was not responding to our initial requests and our only avenue was proceeding with a lawsuit against them. However, in order to proceed, notice letters must be sent that provides for certain time to pass before a lawsuit can be brought. We explained this process to you in detail on multiple occasions. We understand that this process can be frustrating as it takes time, and we apologize for any inconvenience it may have caused.

After many interactions, we made the difficult business decision to withdraw our representation. We recommend you consult with another attorney regarding your case. We understand that this may not be the outcome you were hoping for. We sincerely apologize for any disappointment this may cause. We truly hope new representation achieves a successful outcome for you.

reviews.text: Upon meeting Scott, his demeanor, his compassion for my case, and his overall goodwill, I knew this was the person I trusted to represent me. I want to emphasize on the word trust, because not for a split second, did I have to question his intentions on why he would take me on as a client. I reached out to him, and he extended his hand right back. He didn't have me wait. I was never an obligation. Scott reached back as a friend. A friend that said "Don't worry. I can help." I have tears in my eyes when I think of all  his efforts he put into my case. It's not something I could repay him for. I was once again able to sleep at night. I've reached out to him more than once. He fought for me when a debt collector was attempting to "double dip" after he was fully paid. And then again, when I can literally turn to someone and say "Scott and the Fistel Team kept me from losing my home." He made sure that didn't happen and he made sure no one tried to do it again. He contacted all parties and he put his name on the line for me. He had my back. I felt safe. I felt at ease. And I knew I could trust him and his team to take on anything or anyone that was trying to take what I worked so hard for. I know I made true friends with this entire group. They all stood in front of me to make sure I was well taken cared of. I'm eternally grateful. I hope I never need another lawyer, but if I do, my very first choice would be Scott Fistel and his amazing group of hard working attorneys. I can't thank you enough. I would highly recommend the Fistel Group.

Lawyer Scott Fistel and his team are amazing!! I had the pleasure of working with them recently on a dispute, and the team went above and beyond my expectations. I had previously tried to rectify my situation with another “bigger” law firm which didn’t give me the attention or focus that was needed. After months of inaction I contacted Mr. Fistel and the issue was resolved within a few weeks. This wasn’t a small task as a huge leasing corporation had put me into collections for a debt that I did not owe. To the team at Bello & Soowal,

I am deeply grateful for the exceptional support and representation I received during an investigation that was both unnecessary and emotionally distressing. Individuals within the school system unfairly targeted me for health-related reasons, turning a situation that should have prompted understanding into a painful ordeal. My case escalated all the way to the state level, and during that time, I felt my spirit was completely broken.

After consulting with several attorneys, my family and I unanimously chose Bello & Soowal because of the professionalism, compassion, and integrity they demonstrated from our very first conversation. Throughout the process, they kept me fully informed, addressed every concern with patience and care, and advocated for me with unwavering dedication.

Thanks to their efforts, my case with the state was ultimately dismissed. Words cannot express how much that meant to me. For 18 months, I struggled to reclaim my sense of self after facing such injustice—but with Bello & Soowal’s guidance and advocacy, I am finally regaining my strength, confidence, and peace of mind.

They are extraordinary—knowledgeable, kind, and genuinely invested in their clients. I wholeheartedly recommend Bello & Soowal and would give them not just five, but a thousand stars.

With sincere gratitude,

Renzo Giraldo

reviews.text:
My Experience with the Law Office of Nathan Soowal

I want to share my experience with the law office of Mr. Nathan Soowal so that others can be aware. Throughout my collaboration with him, I faced numerous difficulties due to a serious lack of accountability and transparency.
For several months, Mr. Soowal and his assistant consistently ignored my calls. I had to call from different phone numbers to finally get a response, as they would not answer my calls despite the fact that I was their client. Whenever I managed to speak with them, the only response I received was, "The school’s lawyer is not responding to our emails." I repeatedly asked them to send me copies of these emails to verify their claims, but they never complied with my request.

Mr. Soowal and his assistant provided me with misleading information, which caused me significant stress and concern. Ultimately, I was unable to obtain my transcript, and my case dragged on for over one year without any progress before they withdrew without taking any meaningful action.

From the very beginning, when I signed the contract, I clearly stated to Mr. Soowal that my goal was to obtain my **transcript from the school.However, he agreed to take my case despite lacking the necessary expertise and experience, only to collect his fees. Initially, he assured me that he could help, but later it became evident that the necessary actions to advance my case were not being taken.
The school repeatedly altered my transcript and I had evidence proving that these actions were improper, yet Mr. Soowal took no action to address the issue. I asked him multiple times to report these matters to the State Bar and the Florida Board of Educationbut he failed to do so.Other attorneys I consulted with confirmed that the first legal step should have been to report these violations to the appropriate authorities. I have all the letters and documents proving that I repeatedly requested these actions. When I realized he wasn’t taking any steps, I decided to report the case to the **General State Attorney** myself, but he discouraged me by saying, "If the school is shut down, you won’t be able to get your degree. Now, I find myself in a very difficult emotional state. I have neither obtained my degree from this school nor has the misconduct of the institution been exposed to the relevant authorities. However, I am determined to continue taking legal action. I may not be able to recover my degree, but I will do my best to ensure that the **Florida Board of Education** is made aware of the school’s actions.
If you are considering studying in Florida, I strongly recommend that you make informed decisions. The educational regulations in Florida differ significantly from states like California, and it is important to have a clear understanding of the legal and procedural landscape before making any commitments.

I am sharing this experience to help other students make better-informed decisions and avoid similar challenges.

I will be reporting this firm to the Florida Bar due to a severe lack of communication.  We gave Nathan Soowal the mandat to represent us in July 2023. We pay him several thousands dollars because he said we had a strong case and he had the best interest for our child. Barely nothing has been done since. We were not getting any informations on the claim, no follow ups, no calls, no updates, no game plans. We are always reaching out to get updates and THEY DO NOT RETURN OUR CALL.

Despite repeated attempts to meet with them and speak with Nathan Soowal, they have not returned our calls or provided us with any update on our claim. Specifically, they have failed to attend at 2 separate Zoom appointments that we set up with Ella the paralegal and they have not returned any of our calls

This was a very sensitive and troubling matter for our family.   Your failure to perform your duties and responsibilities to us as clients has exacerbated this matter for us – and is a clear breach of your duties as a lawyer and as a fiduciary.

DO NOT HIRE THIS FIRM. They do not care about their clients. THEY STOLE OUR MONEY!

The consultation lasted an hour and a half, during which he guided us through everything. He even accompanied us to the interview when our case was in Orlando, and when we were asked certain questions, he was already prepared with the documents, demonstrating his genuine concern for our case. Although many conversations were with Martina, his colleague, it was clear they had excellent communication because he was fully informed. My process was very quick; we submitted the documents on September 16th, had the interview on February 11th, received a response on the 12th, and my physical residency card arrived on the 23rd. I highly recommend them!

Thank you Mr. David Hoines for working so hard and professionally. I deeply appreciate you for being so caring in your legal duties here at Fairways of Sunrise HOA, my Community. God bless you and your team.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the outstanding legal services provided by the Law Offices of David Hoines. Over the past year, Mr. Hoines has demonstrated an unparalleled work ethic and an unwavering commitment to justice that has greatly benefited my association.

One of the standout qualities of Mr. Hoines is his dedication to uncovering and challenging unlawful practices. Thanks to his expertise, we discovered, with the assistance of the city of Sunrise, that towing cars from driveways is deemed a criminal offense. This revelation was pivotal in rectifying several cases for our association, and Mr. Hoines played a pivotal role in navigating the complexities of the legal system.

Beyond his deep understanding of the law, Mr. Hoines exhibits a genuine concern for the well-being of his clients. He took the time to thoroughly explain our rights and options, ensuring we felt informed and empowered throughout the legal process. His transparency and communication skills are truly commendable.

In addition to his professionalism, Mr. Hoines and his team showcased remarkable efficiency in handling our cases. Their attention to detail, proactive approach, and strategic thinking were instrumental in achieving favorable outcomes.

I wholeheartedly recommend the services of the Law Offices of David Hoines to anyone seeking legal representation. His expertise, work ethic, and dedication to justice make him an invaluable ally in navigating the legal landscape. If you find yourself in need of legal support, do not hesitate to trust Mr. Hoines and his team – they truly go above and beyond to secure the best possible results for their clients.

reviews.text:
I used Rossen Law Firm a few months ago to help a friend facing a very serious charge. From the very first call, I was blown away by how they operate. Instead of speaking with just one lawyer, two attorneys immediately jumped on the call to brainstorm strategy. They have a team of about six lawyers, and the way they work is collaborative, every case gets the benefit of multiple minds working together. You’re not just hiring one attorney; you’re getting an entire team brainstorming through the best possible outcomes.

What impressed me most was how they handled the situation with zero judgment. They were straightforward, realistic, and gave us a clear picture of the best, middle, and worst-case scenarios. They walked us through what to expect, set timelines and deadlines, and explained exactly what we needed to be prepared for if this turned into a long battle.

The result? The best possible outcome! The charge was dismissed before the month was over, and we never even had to set foot in a courtroom. For someone with a clean record, that outcome was to summarize: life-changing!

Rossen Law Firm is the first law group I’ve ever seen confront a crisis head-on with this level of tact, teamwork, and transparency. I will absolutely turn to them for any future legal needs, whether for myself or friends. Highly recommended.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review. We’re honored that you trusted us to help your friend through such a serious situation and are thrilled we could achieve the best possible outcome. Our team prides itself on working collaboratively, providing clear guidance, and offering non-judgmental support, so it means a lot to hear that this came through in your experience. We truly appreciate your trust and recommendation and are always here if you or your friends ever need us in the future.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your message. We know how overwhelming a VOP can feel, and we're glad your coworker found hope and support with our team. That’s exactly what we’re here for.

reviews.text: Armand at Rossen Law Firm is seriously one of Fort Lauderdale’s goto attorneys when it comes to DUI or criminal defense. His reputation speaks volumes, fearless, and deeply knowledgeable about how the system works (you can tell when you talk to him). He and the team put everything into their cases. They’re not just here to go through the motions; they fight smart and hard for their clients. What’s even more impressive is how transparent and informative they are just check out their Youtube channel. They break things down in a way that actually makes sense, which shows how much they care about educating and empowering people. If you want someone in your corner who knows how to handle high stakes situations and gets real results, Armand is that guy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such a thoughtful and encouraging review! Armand and our team are committed to fighting hard and smart for every client, and we’re glad our efforts to educate and support the community stand out. Your words mean a lot!

reviews.text: Scott Simmons was amazing—he helped me through a tough case with confidence and care. He’s knowledgeable, honest, and truly had my back. Highly recommend him and the whole firm, they’re responsive and are on top of everything!!!

I cannot thank Attorney Scott Simmons enough for his incredible help with my traffic ticket and license suspension. From our very first conversation, he was clear, knowledgeable, and truly had my back through the past few months. I was overwhelmed and unsure what to do, but Rossen Law walked me through every step, explained the process in a way I could actually understand, and handled everything with confidence and professionalism.

The amount of gratitude I feel from being represented by Attorney Simmons, as well as everyone else in this outstanding firm such as Adam, Carlos, and Beatriz...is immense. If you're looking for a team that genuinely cares and knows exactly how to fight for you, this is the one. Thank you all!!

I have nothing but words of gratitude for this team of lawyers.

My case began as a simple procedure, but unfortunately, at the beginning, I fell into the hands of unethical lawyers who complicated everything and made me waste time and money. Luckily, I found this firm, which from the very first moment treated me with professionalism, clarity, and, above all, compassion.

They patiently explained everything to me, took on my already complicated case, and resolved it flawlessly. They were always available, attentive to my questions, and with a highly professional attitude. Thanks to them, I was able to close this chapter with peace of mind and confidence.

I recommend their services without hesitation. I wish I had found them from the start.

Thank you so much for everything.

My experience with Miller Law Group was extremely disappointing. They consistently missed important deadlines, ignored my attempts to get updates, and often became irritated when I simply asked for information about my case.

Another serious issue was that they pushed me to pay for translations through providers they suggested, even though I preferred to use other services of my own choice. This felt more like pressure than professional guidance.

In the end, their lack of organization, poor communication, and disrespect toward the client made me lose time and trust. I do not recommend this firm to anyone expecting to be treated with seriousness and responsibility.

Do not recommend 👎🏼
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience with our office. We understand that our decision not to proceed with your case was disappointing, and we regret that it led to a negative outcome for you. However, we would like to clarify the circumstances surrounding our decision and the points you've raised in your review. Our firm strives for transparency and professionalism in all our interactions with clients. Unfortunately, we found it challenging to continue with your case due to the specific requirements and expectations you had, which we were unable to align with in a manner that would have been beneficial for both parties. Regarding the translation services, we did discuss the option of using our services to handle document translations as part of the case costs, which is a standard practice allowed by law. It was presented as an option, not a requirement, and was intended to streamline the process for your benefit. We value open communication and strive to keep our clients informed about the progress of their cases. Our decision not to proceed was based on a thorough evaluation of the case's potential and the working relationship. We appreciate your feedback and hope that our clarification provides a more balanced view of the situation. We continue to work diligently to provide the best possible service to our clients and appreciate the trust they place in us.

reviews.text: Over the past year, the team at Donaldson & Weston in Lake Mary has been absolutely exceptional. I have had the pleasure of having Brendan Sweeney both as a colleague and as my attorney for many years. I think there are three things that make Brendan an excellent attorney.  First is experience.  He has gone toe-to-toe with lawyers of all kinds.  Whether he needs to respond to a complex legal argument from a large international law firm or deal with a shady opposing counsel’s tricks, Brendan handles it with poise.  Second is empathy.  Brendan genuinely cares about his clients.  There are many lawyers and law firms out there who claim to do this, but they will often pass you off to legal assistants, paralegals, or receptionists, and hardly return your calls.  Brendan takes the time to communicate with his clients and understands how their particular legal issues affect their lives.  Third is professionalism.  Not only does Brendan fight for his clients, he does it in a way that earns the respect of judges and other attorneys.  This translates into better outcomes for his clients and is something he has earned over years of practicing law.  If you are wondering whether to hire Brendan as your attorney, I for one can strongly recommend him.

A very bad experience with attorney Cifuentes. There was a lack of communication between attorney and client. I placed a lot of trust in him, but his actions didn't inspire that trust. He promised a lot and delivered nothing. It's that simple. Anyway, I just wish him God's blessings.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I understand your family’s position. However you state there was a lack of communication. You literally spoke to my assistant daily and I spoke to you often. I spoke to you before and after every hearing. I picked up your gf phone calls. You chose to change lawyers without even discussing it with us.

I never promised a single thing. On the contrary I told you that I thought it was best for her to depart and fight to come back with a waiver. I stopped charging attorney fees because I was sympathetic to your situation and I knew the case would be difficult to win after discovering her admissions to crimes. She is still detained months later after hiring another attorney.

Please reply what I promised or what we did wrong in her case.

reviews.text:
I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to this incredible law firm for their support throughout my immigration process.

First and foremost, thank you to Eduardo Cifuentes, who, as the lead attorney, handled my case with exceptional commitment, dedication, and professionalism. He always took the time to understand my situation personally, providing me with security and confidence every step of the way.

I also want to thank attorney Morgen, who accompanied me to my USCIS appointment. Her support was crucial at such an important moment, making me feel calm and supported.

And I must mention Claudia, the assistant, who was a key part of the entire process. Her kindness, efficiency, and care made all the difference. She was always attentive to every detail and willing to help.

Thank you to the entire team for your excellence, for treating each case with compassion, and for making it possible for me to achieve this great milestone in my life today.

I recommend them with complete confidence. They are a wonderful team!

I worked with attorney Edward Cifuentes for four years. Previous lawyers rejected my case because I had lived in the USA before, but Cifuentes, along with attorney Morgan and their assistants, Carolina and Claudia, were excellent. They guided me through the entire process and advised me every step of the way. I highly recommend Cifuentes and his entire team. They truly know their stuff, and I now have my green card.
My case took 11 years, it was a tough battle, I couldn't be more grateful for that, I highly recommend this office, specially giving how well treated I was by the attorneys and assistants.

Simply incompetent. At first they are attentive to get your money, but after you finish paying and they no longer need you, they don't care at all. Before my check-in at Miramar, I called several times seeking guidance, which would have been the role of my lawyer, but the office itself simply doesn't know what's going on with the cases. In short, I was deported. I'm not indignant about being deported, because I won't be hypocritical since I entered the country illegally, but this office, which was once excellent, is now nothing but a source of frustration. I hope the owner or partners will reconsider their policy. They abandoned my case, claiming they called my wife. Yes, my wife changed her number, but she went to the office and gave them her new number, where she never received a call. I know they will respond here arrogantly as always, but I know what happened, and God knows too; His justice never fails.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I understand your frustration as I share your frustration with this new government. As you stated we are an excellent office and continue the same practices we have for many years. We offer NO charge consultations for existing clients. We offer the best possible guidance. If you felt you did not have enough guidance then you should have reached out to schedule appointment to discuss your case. There was no error or incompetence in your case. It is simple, ICE policies have changed. I do not collect money and abandon. I never have in 20 years and will NOT start now.

No bad feelings toward you for your review. Best of luck, it is hard to understand what is going on in this world.

reviews.text: Used Edward for my sisters case of immigration. I appreciated his time and he explained every option and answered multiple questions. I highly recommend him.

My husband and I highly recommend Mr. Cifuentes and his practice. We spoke to two other attorneys before meeting with Mr. Cifuentes, both of which were concerned with the details of our case and one of which refused to take us on at all. Cifuentes, however, always approached our case with confidence and handled the hiccups and hurdles with complete professionalism. After 6 years now my husband has returned from Honduras and is awaiting his Green Card in the mail.

To everyone who met with and helped us along through the case we thank you! Carolina, Mr. Cifuentes, Claudia, and the many other behind the scenes.

If you are looking for an honest, fair, hard working law office to help you navigate your immigration case, this is the one to choose.

I am very grateful to attorney Cifuente and Carolina for their excellent work; I recommend them 100%.
I had a good experience with the office, my case lasted 10 year, tough battle but in the end it was all worth it. A big thanks to everyone here in the office
I had an amazing experience, from beginning of my case, until the end, I am very grateful for all support from Law Offices of Edward Cifuentes, Carolina and Qasim. Thank you so much!

Hi everyone,
I would like to share my experience with Cifuentes law firm. With God grace and the legal team that assisted my husband in the change of status. Mr. Cifuentes himself started the process by consulting us on the process of our case. He was caring but always straightforward he was very clear and always available when he had any problems. Our case did take longer than expected but due to Covid and so many other situations that we had no power over. But I’m happy to share that my husband finally got his Green Card and I would also love to give a big Thank you to Claudia she was the assistant that helped me when I was panicking because of what’s going on now in the world. She assisted us with our case and follow through til the end. Claudia if you see this! “Thank you so much for always showing compassion and understanding.  The kindness you provide is exactly what this world needs.” So if anyone is looking for immigration lawyer and want to be more than just a client come see them and see for yourselves.

Now I finally have my green card, and I can visit my country again.

My wife received her green card in record time, less than 7 months during these difficult immigration times, and mine has just been approved too! I thank Carolina Lima, the lawyers, and the entire team for their dedication and promptness in yet another success story!

I’m very grateful to Carolina Lima from Law Offices of Cifuentes & Associates and the team for all their hard work on my case. They were professional, helpful, and always guided me through each step. Thanks to them, my case was approved. I highly recommend their services.
Rozana Dos Santos.

I’m honored to give this review!!!! Working with Carolina and others at the Law Office of Cifuentes & Associates was amazing. I had one of those never racking cases but they did what they do best and have me smiling with my 10 years residency card. I appreciate it and highly recommend to  anyone.

I cant put it into words how happy i am feeling at this moment, my asylum has been granted, would like to thanks cifuentes law, and more especially my lawyer Qasim and the whole cifuentes team for making this possible God bless yall.

My experience with Edward Cifuentes and Carolina Lima was truly exceptional. From the very beginning, they treated my case with dedication, professionalism, and genuine care. Throughout the entire legal process, they walked by my side, offering not just legal support, but also encouragement and reassurance when I needed it most.

Thanks to their hard work and guidance, today I can proudly say that my residency has been approved. I’m beyond grateful for everything they did for me. This achievement wouldn’t have been possible without their incredible support. I highly recommend their services to anyone looking for trustworthy  and knowledgeable legal professionals.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart!

I would like to express my gratitude to Eduard and everybody from this office.
It was a long 8 years process  for my son’s green card , and to be honest many times i got discouraged  especially when other people were  telling  me   that  i was wasting my time with this law office!
Thank God, i didn’t listen to them !
I’d  like to give a special thanks to
Claudia. This last year and a half, she was  very patient. always kind even when i got frustrated with all the paperwork . She always encouraged and gave me hope !  You all are amazing !!!Thank you Thank you thank you !
I want to thank Abogado Qasim , mrs Carolina and everyone at cifunentes law who helped me. They made the processo easy and smooth and gave me peace of mind! Thank you for all that you do

My name is Lourdes, and I became a permanent resident in 2018. I consulted with several lawyers to try to get my husband's immigration papers sorted, but they all said it couldn't be done. However, two of my husband's friends told him about the lawyer Cifuentes, so I made an appointment, and we went with my husband. He said he could help us, and we started the process. They guided us through the steps. I know it was a process that took several years, but it was worth the wait. Sometimes, as humans, we want everything fast, but it's not possible; it's God's timing, not ours. Thanks to Claudia, who was always attentive to the entire process, everything went well. Two years ago, my husband received his fingerprinting appointment, and this year he received his waiver and got his visa appointment. The day arrived when we had to travel to Mexico because my husband is from Mexico. Many people told us not to travel, saying that with everything we hear, we wouldn't come back. But I told my husband, "By faith, I know we will go and return." We went to see Claudia, and she gave us the necessary paperwork. What to bring to present to immigration: We traveled to Ciudad Juárez on May 9, 2025. My husband had his appointment, fingerprints, and clinic appointment, and on May 19, 2025, he had his immigration interview. Thanks to God, and to attorney Cifuentes and Claudia, and because we had the complete package, his visa to return to the United States was approved, and my husband has already received his residency. Many thanks, first to God, and to attorney Cifuentes and Claudia for all their support during the 7 years the process lasted. I highly recommend attorney Cifuentes and Claudia; they are very professional, as is their entire team. Thank you so much. To those who have appointments, don't be afraid to go because everything turns out well.

Thank you so much Law Offices Cifuentes! You made all the difference for this new stage of life in the USA, all the professionalism and dedication were exceptional, I would especially like to thank Carolina Lima for her excellent work and for all her dedication to our process, we are truly grateful. (GC Approved)
Thank you so much..☺️

The best of the best legal teams in the USA. I have no words to describe how grateful I am to Dr. Edward Cifuentes and Dr. Carolina Lima for the excellent work on my case. In less than 7 months I received all my documentation by mail (social security and Green Card). I am so happy and thankful! God bless you 🙏🏻

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Victory!!! My Green Card has arrived!
After 7 years of struggle, I finally received my residency — and this victory would not have been possible without the exceptional work of attorney Eduardo Cifuentes.

These were difficult years, filled with pain, anxiety, uncertainty, and many moments when I almost gave up.
I questioned the process, I doubted myself, and even felt at times that the law office wasn't doing everything they could.
But today, with my green card in hand, I can say with complete certainty: Dr. Cifuentes was right all along.

My case was extremely complicated. The long wait made me lose hope.
But every time I spoke to Eduardo, he gave me peace. He explained everything clearly and gave me strength to keep going.
Both he and Carolina were incredibly patient with me — even when I was emotionally exhausted, scared, and confused.
They never treated me coldly, never ignored me. They were always present, with respect, attention, and genuine kindness.

Now I understand that every stage of my case was handled with seriousness, professionalism, and true dedication.
Even behind the scenes, when it felt like nothing was happening, they were taking care of everything.

Receiving my green card felt like a miracle.
And I can say without exaggeration: Eduardo Cifuentes performs miracles — with efficiency.

If you're starting or going through any immigration process, there is no better lawyer than him.
He has experience, strategic vision, and above all — humanity. That is rare and valuable.

I am forever grateful.
May God bless Dr. Cifuentes, Carolina, and the entire team at Cifuentes & Associates, every day of their lives.

– Mirelly Miranda

My case wasn't easy. Many things happened along the way, but since I started with them in August 2022, they've been by my side every step of the way. And today, after so much struggle, I finally received my 10-year green card! 🙌💚

I want to give a special thank you to Dr. Carolina Lima, who was there for me so many times—always so kind, attentive, and ready to help. And also to Dr. Cifuentes, who was a great support and always encouraged me when I needed it most.

I am so grateful to God for this journey and for the wonderful people He has placed in my path. If you are looking for a firm that truly cares about you and fights for your future with dedication and heart, Cifuentes & Associates is the right choice.

Thank you so much for everything—truly. 💛

Infinite gratitude throughout the process of obtaining U.S. residency. This is a team deeply committed to their clients—always available, supportive, and patient in addressing countless questions and concerns.

It was excellent work. The lawyer and all his assistants were very attentive to my case and kept me informed every step of the way. The lawyer was always available to answer my questions. Thanks to God and to the team of attorney Edward Cifuentes, I now have my green card.
Very thankful for this law firm! My family and I appreciate everything Eduar Cifuentes and Claudia have done for us. I Highly recommend!

I am so grateful to have found Attorney Cifuentes. He helped me with my asylum case, then with my U-Visa application, and finally with my residency case. I can't express how grateful I am for his help, dedication, and commitment. Thank you to him and his team! I recommend him 100%.

I have been a client of Edward for 17 years. I had an extremely difficult case, but Edward never gave up on me. I had a removal order and he was able to close my case as well as getting my motion to reopen granted. After so much time and dedication, I am finally a resident and have my green card. I cannot thank Edward enough for all the time and effort he put towards my case.

Putting my trust in attorney Cifuentes was the best thing I ever did. Although my case was long and difficult, they always supported me and overcame every obstacle we faced. I extend my deepest gratitude to attorney Cifuentes, Carolina, the secretaries, and especially to Claudia, who patiently and professionally helped me until the very end without giving up. Hugs to all of them, and I highly recommend them.

I want to take a moment to express my gratitude to Edward Cifuentes and his team. They have been an incredible support throughout our journey. This team is truly professional, and most importantly, they care deeply for their clients. Even during challenging moments, Edward always found a way to help us overcome them. Gracias por todo y que Dios los bendiga. I highly recommend working with Cifuentes!

Such was our very disappointing experience with a local property insurance company. It had all the signs and promise of a nightmare without any future of a positive resolution.

At the onset we were getting denial after denial after denial...

Clearly, we had to get help, professional, competent, adroit and skilled to maneuver what was to come in dealing with our insurer.

We were recommended Edward Jimenez who agreed to take our case and take us through the process of getting the insurer to deliver on their contractual agreement.  First and foremost, Edward took us through the various steps  involved in how  he would be challenging the denials from the insurer and making sure that the claim was settled.

A very affable, professional and courteous attorney. Diligently kept us in the loop every step of the way with regular communications and updates as it pertained to next steps during the back and forth with the insurer.

We had definitely made not only the right choice but the superior and smartest choice in selecting Edward Jimenez and his team to represent us.

Reach out to Edward and his very professional team.

He is the right law firm when you feel that your insurer is not treating  you the same way when they were chosen as your insurer and have suddenly become an adversary at your most vulnerable moment which is when  you have a claim.

reviews.text: Edward and his team were quick, efficient, responsive, friendly and super helpful with our hurricane claim. It had been over a year since we filed the claim and our public adjuster had worked with Edward Jimenez previously, so they recommended his firm, Jimenez Legal. I gave them a call and Edward was able to take over all the documents from our PA firm and get things in motion quickly. Our insurance company was super-responsive once Edward got involved. reviews.text:
I was ordered by my 5th judge to get a lawyer due to heart attack destroyed 80% of my heart.

I spent a half hour talking to this guy about taking over case.

Case was way above his knowledge, over 300 filings, opposing counsel largest firm in Florida. So he asked me for a million in Bitcoin to take on case. I declined his generous offer.

I have another that is pushing it's statute of limitations. So I stopped by his office, guy tells a fully disabled senior I wasted his time looking into other case a judge ordered me to hire a lawyer on.

Wait, I got 6 case cites in US Supreme Court, was a Judge on an international religious court and one of my doctorates is in law.

This putz thinks it's a waste of time looking into a case where the person lost his ability to make millions a year? The SSA determined my injury was a permanent disability I can't work.

Stay away from this guy, his bedside manner is equal to a bed bug.
I thank attorney Gary for handling my car accident case. I am happy with the outcome and would highly recommend him. Thank you!
